name: Ghost ProtoClaw + OpenClaw
description: One-click deploy: Ghost ProtoClaw (AI control panel) + OpenClaw (AI runtime) + PostgreSQL — fully wired, zero manual configuration.

GhostProtoClaw.name: Ghost ProtoClaw
GhostProtoClaw.description: AI Mission Control panel — manages agents, workflows, and the OpenClaw runtime.

build.buildCommand: npm install && npx prisma generate && npm run build

RESEND_API_KEY.description: API key from https://resend.com — used to send login links and invites. Sign up free at resend.com/signup.

OPENROUTER_API_KEY.description: API key from https://openrouter.ai — recommended AI provider. Gives access to hundreds of models through one key.

MISSION_CONTROL_ADMIN_EMAIL.description: Your email address — used to create the initial admin account and for password recovery.

MISSION_CONTROL_ADMIN_PASSWORD.description: Choose a strong password for your admin account. You will use this to log in to Mission Control.

MISSION_CONTROL_ADMIN_NAME.description: Your name (optional). Used as the admin display name and default organization name.

OpenClaw.name: OpenClaw
OpenClaw.description: AI runtime engine — executes agents, tools, and workflows orchestrated by Ghost ProtoClaw.

OPENCLAW_WEBHOOK_SECRET.description: Shared secret for webhook communication between Ghost ProtoClaw and OpenClaw. Auto-generated — do not change.
